description.value:
Also at 1st level, you can call upon your predecessors for aid, assisting you in combat and even your day to day life. Choose one ancestor that you may call upon twice per rest as a free action or when you roll initiative. These spectral beings float behind you, their spirits guiding you down the path to success.

They last for 1 minute after initiative is rolled, and 1 hour outside of combat. They can converse about their life, and give you advice or convey their thoughts through action. You may choose another ancestor to call upon at 7th level and another one at 15th level.

  • The Warrior: You channel the soul of your clan's most esteemed warrior, granting you their prestigious combat prowess. The first time you would make a ranged attack each turn you deal 1d10 additional force damage and you gain damage reduction equal to your taijutsu ability modifier.

Starting at 11th level, this additional damage increases to 2d8.

  • The Assassin: You channel the soul of your clan's most esteemed assassin, granting you their prestigious combat prowess. You increase the critical threat by +1 range of your ranged weapon and taijutu attacks and you may dash, disengage, or hide as a bonus action.

Starting at 11th level, you gain a +2 to attack rolls to any creature you are hidden from.

  • The Seer: You channel the soul of your clan's most esteemed seer, granting you their prestigious awareness. You gain 30 feet of chakra sight and 60 feet of darkvision. Additionally, you gain a +1 to saving throws and creature's within the range of your chakra sight have disadvantage on all stealth checks they make against you. Finally, you gain expertise in perception, survival, and nature.

Starting at 11th level, you double your chakra sight and darkvision ranges and gain 30 feet of truesight.
